de.uka.ilkd.key.gui.extension.api

Interface KeYGuiExtension.Toolbar

  • All Known Subinterfaces:
    KeYToolbarExtensionAdapter
    All Known Implementing Classes:
    DockingLayout, ExplorationExtension, HeatmapExt, TestExtension, TestgenExtension
    Enclosing interface:
    KeYGuiExtension

    public static interface KeYGuiExtension.Toolbar
    This interface describes the UI extension to add a KeYGuiExtension.Toolbar into the main window.

    • Method Summary

      All Methods Instance Methods Abstract Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      javax.swing.JToolBar getToolbar(MainWindow mainWindow)
      A toolbar which will be embedded into the main window.s

    • Method Detail

      • getToolbar

        @Nonnull
javax.swing.JToolBar getToolbar(MainWindow mainWindow)
        A toolbar which will be embedded into the main window.s
        Parameters:
        mainWindow - the parent of the toolbar
        Returns:
        non-null
